# amCharts: cursor maxTooltipDistance 0 does not work when a series has null values

added a ticket here:
https://github.com/amcharts/amcharts4/issues/2314

## Timeline

- 2020-04-04T15:38:17Z @tobiu added the `bug` label
### @tobiu - 2020-04-05T16:44:16Z

`maxTooltipDistance: -1` did the trick.

thanks @martynasma.

- 2020-04-05T16:44:16Z @tobiu closed this issue
